name: Volume Maximizer
short_description: A great box with the most required sound tools for perfect sounding, which you can use in addition to your music making software.
detailed_description:
Your song needs to be spiced up with professional sound effects, and now you can do it just in few seconds! We have a wide range of instruments to work with your songs - audio compressor, gain booster, bass booster, stereo enhancer and music equalizer. Also you can create your personal sound effects preset for future songs mastering.

Make the most of your song in 3 simple steps:

  • Upload an audio file from your computer
  • Choose filters and adjust the parameters
  • Listen to the final version of your song and save it

Best sound instruments are collected here - boost up your song in no time with Volume Maximizer.

supported_languages: English, German, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese
